case_title: CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. JOHN ERNEST GARCIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOHN ERNEST AN INDIVIDUAL DBA NU LOOK CONSTRUCTION AND NULOOK WINDOW AND CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOHN ERNEST AN INDIVIDUAL DBA NU LOOK CONSTRUCTION AND NULOOK WINDOW AND CONSTRUCTION $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
